scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.type: npm run type -w apps/web && npm run type -w apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:patch -w apps/web && npm run version:patch -w apps/api && npm run version:patch -w packages/core && npm run version:patch -w packages/config
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:minor -w apps/web && npm run version:minor -w apps/api && npm run version:minor -w packages/core && npm run version:minor -w packages/config
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:major -w apps/web && npm run version:major -w apps/api && npm run version:major -w packages/core && npm run version:major -w packages/config
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "WEB,API" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
